storyboard.content: My right arm and face go completely numb and tingly during these episodes
During the episodes I have trouble speaking - my words come out slurred or I just cannot find the right words
During the most recent episode I also had trouble seeing clearly out of my right eye
This has happened three times in the past seven days, with the first episode a week ago, and the episodes seem to be getting worse each time
Each episode lasts about 15 to 20 minutes and then gradually goes away on its own, but the latest one was the worst so far
The symptoms completely resolve after each episode, so I feel fine in between
